items.title: Nostalgia for an Age Yet to Come: Alienation, Neo-Emotions, and Radical Politics in Contemporary Capitalism
items.author: Ian Burkitt1School of Social Sciences, 1905University of Bradford, Bradford, UK
items.content: <article>Emotion Review, Ahead of Print. This article analyzes the emotions of alienation, estrangement, and nostalgia, and how they are central to the production of neo-emotions in contemporary society. Alienation is a product of the macro-social context of capitalist societies and contemporary ...</article>
